playbook.intent: Company OKR -> team OKR -> personal OKR with weekly check-ins and a quarterly blameless retro. Output: every dev knows what their work ladders to
playbook.scope: Company OKR -> team OKR -> personal OKR with weekly check-ins and a quarterly blameless retro. Output: every dev knows what their work ladders to

success-criteria.criterion: All 4 stages have written outputs in the project record
Each stage's decision gate was answered before advancing (yes / no in writing)
Final stage produced the required written decision artifact
Every methodology reference loaded cleanly via `faion get-content`

stage.name: Cascade
stage.intent: Translate company OKRs to team and individual.

tasks.task: Team leads draft team OKRs aligned to company OKRs
Each IC drafts personal commitments aligned to team OKRs

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when every IC has commitments tied to a team OKR.

stage.name: Weekly OKR Check-In

tasks.task: Each team posts confidence (0.0-1.0) per KR weekly
Manager spots dropping confidence and unblocks
Track moving averages, not single weeks

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when 12 consecutive weekly posts exist by quarter end.

stage.name: Mid-Quarter Adjustment

tasks.task: Adjust scope where confidence is sustained <0.3

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when adjustments are written down.

stage.name: Quarter Retro

tasks.task: Final score per KR with evidence
Feed insights into next quarter's planning

stage.decision-gate: Required output: a published retro doc fed into next planning.
